name: Glazed Fruit Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together ginger snaps, graham crackers, and sugar.
2. Drizzle with melted butter, tossing to combine. Press onto the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie plate to form a firm, even crust. Bake at 375°F for 5 minutes. Cool.
3. For glaze, drain pineapple, reserving juice (unsweetened). Cut pineapple into small pieces and set aside.
4. Add enough unsweetened pineapple juice (about 1 1/2 cups) to the reserved juice to make 1 3/4 cups total liquid.
5. In a small saucepan, stir together pineapple liquid and gelatin. Let stand for 5 minutes. Stir over low heat until gelatin dissolves. Cover and chill to the consistency of partially beaten egg whites (partially set).
6. Spread 1/3 cup of the glaze over the bottom of the crust.
7. Arrange bananas on top of the glaze.
8. Top with another 1/3 cup of glaze and arrange strawberries on top.
9. Stir together pineapple pieces and remaining glaze, then spoon over strawberries.
10. Chill for 2 to 4 hours or until set.
11. Before serving, arrange kiwi fruit on top of the pie.
